resources.string: Note :- As a general rule, you should clean your air conditioner filters within the indoor unit in every two weeks. In more dusty or polluted environments you should clean your filters more regularly.
Press the above button twice and check whether the AC responds. If not, try the next model by tapping the right arrow button.
Set up your AC remote configuration.
This feature will work only when the Stabilizer is turned on and connected to Internet.
Fetching AC manufacture list is failed.
Your alternate mobile number has been added successfully.
Your email id has been added successfully.
Your mobile number has been added successfully.

"If you’re already a V-Guard app user, go to Login page and use your registered Mobile Number with OTP to login.
New User? Just continue to get started."

"If you’re already a V-Guard app user, go to Login page and use your registered Email Id with Password/OTP to login.
New User? Just continue to get started."
Please disable i-mode to access breeze mode.
Please disable i-mode to access fan speed.
Please disable i-mode to turn OFF the Imagina.
Display Flip can be enabled only if Fan Display UI is enabled.
Thank you for reaching out to us. Our representative will contact you soon.
Disable Rhythm Mode for setting the color.
Rhythm Mode does not support color selection.
"You can't disable all the lighting modes at once."
Alternate number will be deleted from your account. Press OK to continue.
We will share a verification code on the entered alternate mobile number.

• (Alexa users) - "Ask v guard smart"

For Connect to Device, e.g. if nickname for the Product 1 is “NICKNAME1”, Product 2 is “NICKNAME2” and Product 3 is “NICKNAME3”, then say…

• "Turn on fan in NICKNAME1"– For the next command, nickname is not required.

• "Turn off fan"

• "Turn on schedule 1"

• "Turn off schedule 1"

• "Turn on fan at 4 speed from 3:00 pm for 1 hour"

• "Turn on sleep mode in NICKNAME2"- For the next command, nickname is not required.

• "Turn off sleep mode"

• "Turn on Breeze mode 1"

• "Turn off Breeze mode 1"

• "Set fan speed 4"

• "Status of schedule 1"

• "Detailed status in NICKNAME3" - For the next command, nickname is not required.

• "Turn on holiday mode from 20 July to 20 August"

• "Turn off holiday mode"

• "Tell me something about V Guard smart fan"

• "What is V Guard customer care number"

• "There is an issue with the product, what should I do"

• "What are the commands in NICKNAME3"

• "QR code in NICKNAME3"

• (Alexa users) - "Ask v guard smart"

For Connect to Device, e.g. if nickname for the Product 1 is “NICKNAME1”, Product 2 is “NICKNAME2” and Product 3 is “NICKNAME3”, then say…

• "Turn on heater in NICKNAME1" – For the next command, nickname is not required.

• "Turn off heater"

• "What is present water temperature"

• "Turn on schedule 1"

• "Turn off schedule 1"

• "Turn on heater at 50 degrees from 3:00 pm for 1 hour"

• "I want to take a bath at around 3 pm with warm water"

• "Turn on child lock in NICKNAME2" – For the next command, nickname is not required

• "Turn off child lock"

• "Set water temperature 50 degrees"

• "Set luke temperature to ‘x’ degrees"

• "Status of schedule 1"

• "Status of mains voltage"

• "Detailed status in NICKNAME3" – For the next command, nickname is not required

• "Unit consumed today"

• "Unit consumed yesterday"

• "Unit consumed total"

• "Turn on holiday mode from 20 July to 20 August"

• "Turn off holiday mode "

• "Buzzer unmute"

• "Buzzer mute"

• "Tell me something about V Guard smart water heater"

• "What is V Guard customer care number"

• "There is an issue with the product, what should I do"

• "What are the commands in NICKNAME3"

• "QR code in NICKNAME3"

" • (Alexa users) - Ask v guard smart

For Connect to Device, Connect to <PRODUCT NICK NAME given by you> eg: if nickname is SMART4500 then say Connect to smart four five zero zero

• Inverter detailed status

• Solar savings today

• Solar savings yesterday

• Solar savings total

• Turn on inverter For switch OFF turn off inverter

• Turn on holiday mode For deactivate turn off holiday mode

• Increase performance For default Performance set default performance

• How many times mains failed

• Today mains fail duration

• Status of mains voltage

• Status of load percentage

• V guard customer care number

• Bye

"

• "Ask v guard smart"

For Connect to Device, e.g. if nickname for the Product 1 is “NICKNAME1”, Product 2 is “NICKNAME2” and Product 3 is “NICKNAME3”, then say…

• For Turn on "Turn on plug in NICKNAME1"

• For Turn off "Turn off plug"

• For Schedule, "Turn on schedule 1" "Turn off schedule 1"

• For Set schedule, "Turn on plug from 5pm for 1 hour"

• For ITDS, "Turn on ITDS in NICKNAME2" "Turn off ITDS"

• For power on state, "turn on power on state" "turn off power on state"

• For Schedule status, "status of schedule 1"

• For detail status, "detail status"

• For low cut setting, "Set low cut at 100 volts"

• For high cut setting, "Set high cut at 230 volts"

• For current limit, "Set current limit at 5A"

• For product information, "Tell me something about V Guard smart plug"

• For V guard customer care support, "What is V Guard customer care number" "There is an issue with product what should I do"

• For voice commands, "What are the commands in NICKNAME3"

• For serial number, "QR code"

• (Alexa users) - "Ask v guard smart"

For Connect to Device, e.g., if nickname for the Product 1 is “AQUASMART”, Product 2 is “SMARTFILL”, and Product 3 is “AUTOLEVEL”, then say…

• "Turn on auto mode in AQUASMART"– The next command for AQUASMART, NICK NAME is not required.

• "Turn off auto mode "

• "Turn on schedule 1 in SMARTFILL”"– The next command for SMARTFILL, NICK NAME is not required.

• "Turn off schedule 1 "

• "Turn on schedule 1 at 5 pm for 1 hour "

• "Status of schedule 1 "

• "Turn on holiday mode from July 20 to August 20" (example date format for Google assistant: 20 July, for Alexa: July 20)

• "Turn off holiday mode "

• "Turn on fill tank in AUTOLEVEL" – The next command for AUTOLEVEL, NICK NAME is not required

• "Turn off fill tank "

• "Today’s water consumption "

• "Yesterday’s water consumption "

• "Status of tank level"

• "Status of motor"

• "Status of mains voltage in AQUASMART"– The next command for AQUASMART, NICK NAME is not required.

• "Detailed status"

• "Today’s usage"

• "Yesterday’s usage"

• "Turn on gardening mode "

• "Turn off gardening mode"

• "Set dry sense delay to 3 minutes"

• "Set retry pump to 1 hour"

• "Tell me something about V Guard smart pump "

• "What is V Guard customer care number"

• "There is an issue with the product, what should I do"

• "What are the commands in AUTOLEVEL"

• "QR code in AUTOLEVEL"

• (Alexa users) - "Ask v guard smart"

For Connect to Device, e.g. if nickname for the Product 1 is “NICKNAME1”, Product 2 is “NICKNAME2” and Product 3 is “NICKNAME3”, then say…

• "Turn on ac in NICKNAME1" – For the next command, nickname is not required.

• "Turn off ac"

• "Turn on schedule 1"

• "Turn off schedule 1"

• "Turn on AC at 23 degrees from 3:00 pm for 1 hour"

• "Turn on sleep mode at 23 degrees in NICKNAME2" – For the next command, nickname is not required

• "Turn off sleep mode"

• "Set AC fan speed low"

• "Set temperature at 23 degrees"

• "Set display brightness low"

• "Status of schedule 1"

• "Status of mains voltage"

• "Detailed status in NICKNAME3" – For the next command, nickname is not required

• "Unit consumed today"

• "Unit consumed yesterday"

• "Unit consumed total"

• "Turn on holiday mode from 20 July to 20 August"

• "Turn off holiday mode "

• "Tell me something about V Guard Smart Stabilizer"

• "What is V Guard customer care number"

• "There is an issue with product what should I do"

• "What are the commands in NICKNAME3"

• "QR code in NICKNAME3"

The retrofit switch is defined based on the number of nodes. A 2-node retrofit includes two switches: Switch 1 and Switch 2, while a 4-node retrofit includes four switches: Switch 1, Switch 2, Switch 3, and Switch 4.


• (Alexa users) - "Ask v guard smart"

For Connect to Device, e.g. if nickname for the Product 1 is “NICKNAME1”, Product 2 is “NICKNAME2” and Product 3 is “NICKNAME3”, then say…

• "Turn on switch 1/2/3/4 in NICKNAME1" – For the next command, nickname is not required.

• "Turn off switch 1/2/3/4"

• "Turn on all switch"

• "Turn off all switch"

• "Turn on switch 1/2/3/4 power on state on"

• "Turn on switch 1/2/3/4 power on state off"

• "Turn on holiday mode from 20 July to 20 August"

• "Turn off holiday mode"

• "Detailed status in NICKNAME2" – For the next command, nickname is not required

• "Tell me something about V Guard smart retrofit"

• "What is V Guard customer care number"

• "There is an issue with the product, what should I do"

• "What are the commands in NICKNAME3"

• "QR code in NICKNAME3"

Note: If once we connected to one “NICK NAME”, by using any of these above listed commands, then the second time onwards “NICK NAME” is not required in the skill set, until switching to another product under the same user ID.
Some important virtual assistant commands for V-Guard %s are:
New version of application is available.
Application data syncing failed. Please try again.
"Do you want to delete this product? All data for this product will be lost."
Are you sure you want to delete this user?
* Ideal requirement. Customized solution post site survey
You are trying to connect with some other product.
Do you want to %s the Auto OFF?
Your Inverter is backfed. Please contact customer service.
Battery details are not to be empty.

"Selecting the correct battery type is crucial for performance and safety. Ensure it matches the installed battery.
Are you sure you want to change battery Type?"
Depending upon the battery type used, user should select Tubular or Flat plate battery.
It displays the battery type selection status.
Depending upon battery type used, user should select Tubular/Flat plate etc. battery. Battery type selection can be done from slider switch at backside of product.
Allows users to invert or flip the indication on the Fan display.
Adjust the Fan display orientation to match user preferences.
It display various features like Wi-Fi, Sleep, Mop, Breeze etc on the fan display.
In order to see different modes status on Fan display.
To boost up the Fan speed to maximum.
This mode provides sea breeze kind of wind experience.
Do you want to %s the Buzzer?
You cannot add more than 8 schedules.
Capacity should not be less than %d.
Capacity should not exceed maximum limit of %d.
Your alternate mobile number has been changed successfully.
Your email id has been changed successfully.
Your mobile number has been changed successfully.
Are you sure you want to change Charging mode?
It displays the charging mode selected by user through switch.
Depending upon the battery capacity user should select Charging mode to Normal Charging or Higher Charging.
For faster resolution chat with our expert
Child lock is enabled, so max set temp will be %s degree. Disable child lock to set higher temperature.
Do you want to disable the Child Lock?

"For safeguarding the child from extreme hot water, temperature cut-off is marked at %s degree Celsius and It prevents from changing temperature from Water Heater buttons.
Do you want to enable the child lock?"
Do you want to %s the Child Lock?
Sterilizing Mode is currently enabled. Are you sure you want to proceed with enabling Child Lock?
Have you cleaned the air filter?
(Please provide this to technician on resolution)
1. Here you can view the total battery percentage of the specific product.
%d. Tap here to switch the fan mode.
%d. Here you can adjust the fan speed by sliding the dial.
1. Here you can view the input voltage of your stabilizer.
%d. Here you can adjust the color and brightness to create different moods or atmospheres.
%d. Tap here to schedule an OFF Timer. Your plug will automatically turn off after the specified time duration.
2. Here you can view the output voltage of your stabilizer.
%d. Tap on the power button to turn On or Off your product.
"%d. You can change the connectivity mode by tapping on the Bluetooth/Wi-Fi icon."
%d. Tap on info icon to view the product information.
%d. You can turn On or Off the individual nodes by tapping their respective power buttons and access additional functionalities by tapping on each node.
1. Here you can adjust the temperature by sliding the dial.
"1. Here you can monitor your water tank's water level easily"
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
"You're in control - choose what info you want to share with apps."
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
"Your product is going to configure. Please power on your device and press '%s'."
Product configuration failed, please try again.
Do you want to set alarm?
Are you sure you want to switch ON Appliance mode?
Do you want to %s the Auto Fill?
Do you want to disable the Alarm?
Do you want to disable Display Flip?
Do you want to disable Fan Display UI
Do you want to enable Display Flip?
Do you want to enable Fan Display UI?
Do you want to switch %s Buzzer?
Do you want to switch Fan Reverse Flow %s?
Are you sure you want to switch ON Holiday mode?
Confirm password is not same as password entered
Are you sure you want to switch ON Turbo charging?
Are you sure you want to switch on UPS mode?
Please confirm that below selected address is the correct address (It will be used for technician visits).
Connection failed, retry after some time.
Connect with us to resolve issues
Prior to adding a product, please ensure your %s is verified in your profile.
Please add all AC temperature in Custom Remote.
You cannot create or edit the schedule without learning any temperature from the custom remote.
"You have not yet learned the mandatory keys ("OFF & 24°c) in the custom remote. Please learn the mandatory keys to turn ON/OFF the AC properly.
To view the instructions for learning your AC remote keys, click the instructions below.
Click and send a \"Hi\" via WhatsApp
This feature helps you to maximize solar utilization for next day. To do that it will cut the Inverter mains at night will discharge battery to certain extent in night.
"If people are in house during daytime, then select YES. If nobody is in house during daytime, then select NO. (Works only in Power saver Max mode)."
Are you sure you want to deactivate your account?
You will permanently lose all added devices & property. After this there is no turning back.
Prior to adding a product, please ensure an address is added to your profile.
Are you sure you want to delete your address?
Do you want to delete this schedule.
Deleting shared user has been failed.

"• Turn ON the AC using the remote. • Set desired temperature and fan speed in remote. • Turn OFF the AC using the remote. • In the Mobile app, long press the same temperature button which has been selected through Remote. • It will open another popup window and follow the instructions. "
"• Example: To set 23°C, first set the AC to 24°C using the remote. • In the mobile app, long press the button marked 23°C. • It will open another popup window and follow the instructions. "
"• Turn ON the AC using the remote. • In the mobile app, long press the OFF button. • It will open another popup window and follow the instructions "
"• Short press the button, start from 30°C to 18°C to test the learned key. • Use the RESET button to clear the learned keys. "
"You are now connected to the Water Heater's WiFi network, which doesn't have Internet access. Connect the mobile to a WiFi network and make sure you have active Internet connection."
"Disconnect %s from mobile WiFi. Make sure you have active Internet connection. Please press 'Continue Configuration' to proceed."
Are you sure you want to disable Dry Heat sensing?
Are you sure you want to enable Dry Heat sensing?
This option is used to detect the presence of water inside the water heater tank and protect the tank from overheating.
This is a critical protection and should be handled by an authorized service technician.
A schedule already exists in this time duration.
Power saving mode with comfortable speed.
Are you sure you want to update your address?
We will share a verification code on the entered email id.
End date should not be lesser than current date
V-Guard smart app provides alert when AC usage crosses a set energy limit or set duration.
You have already set the Energy/Time Limit. What would you like to do?
Do you want to enable the Energy/Time Limit?
Stabilizer Energy or Time Limit expired
For generating alert when AC usage exceeds a set energy/time limit.
"You have last reset on %s. Do you want to reset it?"
Please enter a valid nick name
Please enter a valid mobile number
Please enter valid email id or mobile number.
Something went wrong , please try again later!
Monthly bill should be less than 50000
Monthly bill should be less than 400000
Monthly bill should be greater than 0
Connection error/timeout occurred. Ensure product is in Smart Config mode (CF1) and correct Wi-Fi password entered. Please turn OFF & ON the product and put it in CF1. Then try again.
Stabilizer is in delay. Please wait till Stabilizer comes out of delay.
Filter cleaning recommended; you may please clean the AC filter.
Stabilizer is in high voltage shutdown condition and will resume the operation once the mains supply is healthy.
Stabilizer is in low voltage shutdown condition and will resume the operation once the mains supply is healthy.
Stabilizer is in over temperature shutdown. Turn off the Stabilizer, wait for it to cool then turn On. If problem persists please contact customer service.
Stabilizer is overloaded. Please check the connections.
Failed to create Camera image file
"Pump is in bypass mode, please check the switch position on pump OR Pump card Error detected, please contact our customer service."
Water Heater is empty. Please turn off and fill water. Ensure that the water heater is completely filled with water

"Pump is in dry run condition, please check the inlet water source. Auto mode: The pump will automatically start operation based on the selected Retry delay. Gardening mode: Pump will not restart. To recover this error please switch OFF and ON the pump mains switch."
Water level float stuck identified. Please check the installation or contact our customer service.
Water usage is detected during the Holiday Mode and basis requirement user can disable or retain the state.
Pump is in low voltage shutdown condition and will resume the operation once the mains supply is healthy.
Pump is in high voltage shutdown condition and will resume the operation once the mains supply is healthy.
Pump is in overload shutdown, please contact our customer service.
Pump is in Rotor Lock shutdown, please contact our customer service.
Sensor cleaning recommended, this may be due to the contamination in water.
Sensor disconnection detected, please check the sensor connection to the pump and restart the pump.
It seems your product has been reset, please reconfigure your product and try again.
It works only in power saver max mode.
Monthly units should be less than 6000
Monthly units should be less than 30000
Monthly units should be greater than 0
You are trying to connect with some other Inverter.
Press Inverter ON/OFF switch until it blinks or you are trying to connect with some other Inverter!
Are you sure you want to exit from the application?
It will provide you extra backup even after battery gets low.
Useful in emergency case with minimal load.
You are trying to connect with some other Fan !
Fan not found, please make sure that the device is powered ON.
"You won't be able to change speed when Fan is OFF. Please turn ON Fan for changing Fan speed."
"You won't be able to change speed when Regulator is OFF. Please turn ON Regulator for changing speed."
"You won't be able to change speed when Fan is in any \"MODE\". Please disable Fan \"Mode\" for changing Fan speed."
You can set the Fan Speed only in Cool Mode.
Your Inverter feedback wire is open. Please contact customer service.
Please turn off critical loads before starting the update, as this will reset your devices.
"Using this option auto mains force cut will be deactivated and next auto mains force cut will happen once battery is in charged condition. Do you want to continue?"
Please check your mail for password reset link.
Sorry, gardening mode can be enabled only when the tank level is less than 100 percentage.
The fuse in your Inverter has blown. Please get in touch with our customer service for assistance.
Do you want to %s the Gardening Mode?
Gardening mode is active, disable Gardening mode to use this feature.
"You can't operate Geofencing in Bluetooth mode."
"You can't operate Geofencing in WiFi Direct mode."
You have already added geofence. What would you like to do?
V-Guard technician will visit your place to help you with installation. Do you want to continue?
We’re glad you love the app! Thank you for the wonderful rating. We’re committed to bringing you the best experience!

• Set <NICKNAME> temperature to X degrees
(Note: X is Temperature range compatible with AC )

"Note: Please ensure that Google Home App is installed in your mobile. Then click on the below 'Configure' button for linking your device with Google Home.
Note: We have upgraded the Google assistant to smart home action. Now you can directly connect with Google home by linking your product. Kindly share your valuable suggestions/feedback to vgsmartcloud@gmail.com."
Google Home Commands for V-Guard %s are:
You are trying to connect with some other Water Heater!
Enabling this mode activates an Automatic Shut-OFF feature. If the water heater remains inactive for more than 90 minutes, the system enters Power-Saving Mode!
Ensures enhanced safety, as the cut-off temperature is marked at %s˚C. Also, it prevents from changing temperature from Water Heater buttons above %s˚C.
For safeguarding the child from extreme hot water.
V-Guard Smart app provides alert when Heater usage crosses a set energy limit or set duration.
For generating alert when Water Heater usage exceeds a set energy/time limit.

Water Heater will not work in this mode for the selected calendar days and will resume to the normal operation after the selected calendar days or by pressing the ON/OFF switch provided on the Water Heater.
To turn OFF the Water Heater, for the selected calendar days.
Enabling this mode initiates Sterilization of the inner tank at 80°C.
Use this mode to Sterilize the inner tank, promoting a safer and enjoyable bathing experience.
Heating system failed. Immediately switch off Water Heater supply
Your battery is high. Please contact customer service.
Holiday mode & Schedule is active, disable both to use this feature.
Inverter will not works in this mode & even your battery will not get discharged.
When you are going outside for longer duration.
Do you want to disable the Holiday Mode?
Holiday mode is active, disable Holiday mode to use this feature.
I have cleaned the air filter
Imagina not found or is powered OFF.
It enables you to run over capacity loads* for next 15 minutes of time. Please disconnect your heavy loads within time to avoid overload shutdown. Not recommended in UPS mode.
By enabling this mode, Pump will automatically fill the water tank based on the Min, Max settings.
For automatic pump operation including schedule.
This will unlock your battery type selection switch for 30 min, you can change battery type from slider switch at backside of your product.

Approximations are made according to the power consumption of the BLDC Fan. When compared to 1-star rated fans, the BLDC Fan conservatively saves 40% of electricity. In practical terms, for every 3 units of electricity consumed, you would save 2 units. The assumed per unit electricity cost is 7 INR, but the actual savings might differ.
Total Units saved by your Fan.
You can make use of this feature using the charging mode switch behind the Inverter.

"This feature helps you to maximize solar utilization for next day. To do that it will cut the Inverter mains at night will discharge battery to certain extent in night.
If people are in house during daytime, then select YES. If nobody is in house during daytime, then select NO. (Works only in Power saver Max mode)
Do you want to continue?"
This is a unique feature of AQUASMART+, and the pump will be automatically turned OFF after the selected delay, if the pump is running without water.
The user can select the suitable delay time based on the pump delivery head; the default will be 3 minutes.
"Congratulations! You are eligible for extra backup feature. Please reduce your Load & Press Inverter ON/OFF Switch."
Extra backup available only after low battery.
By enabling this mode, Fan will generate alarm daily.
To remind the daily sleep time.
This will mute all buzzer indications.

"Step 1: Turn OFF the Fan with Remote.

Step 2: Press Speed 5 button five times. After that you will hear a long buzzer sound.

Step 3: After that, press 4H Button 5 times. Now you will hear a buzzer sound and the configuration mode is enabled.

Step 4: The configuration mode will be enabled for 15 minutes.

Step 5: Now you can tap on the 'Configure Product' button below.

Step 6: Enter the Wi-Fi router SSID and Password.

Step 7: Select your Smart Fan from the list.
E.g:VG_FAN_BT_WF

IMPORTANT : TURN ON THE SMART PHONE BLUETOOTH BEFORE INITIATING THE CONFIGURE PROCESS AND THE PHONE SHOULD BE IN THE RANGE OF SMART FAN( <10 METER. )

"
Fan will not work in this mode for the selected days. However Fan can be operated using the remote.
To turn OFF the Fan for the selected calendar days.
Allows users to set lighting schedules with specific start and end times, mood modes, colors, intensity levels, and day selections.
Automate lighting to turn ON and OFF at specific times, set mood modes, and adjust colors and intensity for daily routines or special events.
Allows users to set lighting schedules with specific start and end times, brightness, light tone, and day selections.
Automate lighting to turn ON and OFF at specific times, and adjust tone and brightness for daily routines or special events.
By enabling this mode, fan will automatically ON based on the scheduled timings/modes. Maximum 8 schedules can be created.
For automatic fan operation with scheduled timings.
By enabling this mode, Fan will be switched off after selected hours.
By enabling this mode, the Pump will be ON continuously and can be turned ON/OFF with the pump mains switch.

This is a unique feature of V-Guard smart Water Heater. The Water Heater automatically turns ON when the user enters the set perimeter (selectable from 1Km to 5Km) and turns OFF when user goes out from this range.
For automatic heater turn ON/OFF depending on user location.

" Step 1: Turn OFF the Fan with Remote.

Step 2: Press Speed 5 button five times. After that you will hear a long buzzer sound.

Step 3: After that, press    Button 5 times. Now you will hear buzzer sound along with \"C.\", \"F.\", \"G.\" one by one in 7 Segment Display & configuration mode is enabled.

Step 4: The configuration mode will be enabled for 15 minutes.

Step 5: Now you can tap on the 'Configure Product' button below.

Step 6: Enter the Wi-Fi router SSID and Password.

Step 7: Select your Smart Fan from the list.
E.g:VG_FAN_BT_WF

IMPORTANT : TURN ON THE SMART PHONE BLUETOOTH BEFORE INITIATING THE CONFIGURE PROCESS AND THE PHONE SHOULD BE IN THE RANGE OF SMART FAN( <10 METER. )

"

By enabling this mode, water heater provides hot water at the set schedule temperature from the ready time to the end time.The heating takes place prior to the ready time. Maximum 8 schedules can be set.
For automatic heating operation with scheduled timings there by saving energy.
Use it only if you are going out of home for longer duration.
Pump will not work in this mode for the selected calendar days and will resume to the normal operation when water usage has been detected.
To turn OFF the Pump for the selected calendar days.

"Step 1: Turn OFF the Fan with Remote.

Step 2: Press Speed 5 button five times in succession, each button press will be indicated by a corresponding LED glow in a circular pattern.

Step 3: Once step 2 is successful, the LED display changes to a Triangular rotating pattern.

Step 4: Now press the timer 4H button 5 times in succession, each button press will be indicated by a corresponding LED glow in a circular pattern.

Step 5: Once step 4 is successful, the LED display changes to 2 LED pair blink pattern.

Step 6: This configuration mode will be active for 15 minutes.

Step 7: Now you can tap on the 'Configure Product' button below.

Step 8: Enter the Wi-Fi router SSID and Password.

Step 9: Select your Smart Fan from the list.
E.g:VG_FAN_BT_WF

IMPORTANT : TURN ON THE SMART PHONE BLUETOOTH BEFORE INITIATING THE CONFIGURE PROCESS AND THE PHONE SHOULD BE IN THE RANGE OF SMART FAN( <10 METER. )

"

"Step 1: Turn ON the water heater power.

Step 2: Wait for 10 seconds. Then press and Hold UP-DOWN buttons until second beep.

OR


Five times OFF/ON the water heater. Each time, OFF the water heater only after hearing the beep.

Now the display will indicate 'CF1' and water heater will generate 2 beeps in every 2 secs. The configuration mode will be enabled for 15 minutes.

Step 3: Connect the mobile to nearby Wi-Fi router.

Step 4: Now you can tap on the 'Configure Product' button below. On the next page enter the router password and tap on the 'Configure Product' button.


IMPORTANT : TURN ON THE SMART PHONE Wi-Fi BEFORE INITIATING THE CONFIGURE PROCESS AND THE PHONE SHOULD BE IN THE RANGE OF HEATER( <10 METER. )

"

"Step 1: Turn ON the water heater power.

Step 2: Wait for 10 seconds. Then press and Hold UP-DOWN buttons until third beep.

OR


Six times OFF/ON the water heater. Each time, OFF the water heater only after hearing the beep.

Now the display will indicate 'CF2' and water heater will generate 2 beeps in every 2 secs. The configuration mode will be enabled for 15 minutes.

Step 3: Now you can tap on the 'Configure Product' button below and follow the instructions in the app.


IMPORTANT : TURN ON THE SMART PHONE Wi-Fi BEFORE INITIATING THE CONFIGURE PROCESS AND THE PHONE SHOULD BE IN THE RANGE OF HEATER( <10 METER. )

"
This feature allows you to enable various lighting modes on your Luxecube water heater.
It will mute only Changeover buzzer.
By enabling this mode, Plug will be switched off after selected hours.

"Step 1: Turn ON the Water Heater power.

Step 2: Wait for 10 seconds. Then press and Hold UP-DOWN buttons until first beep.

OR


Five times OFF/ON the Water Heater. Each time, OFF the water heater only after hearing the beep.

Now the display will indicate 'CFG' and will generate 2 beeps in every 2 secs. The configuration mode will be enabled for 15 minutes.

Step 3: Now you can tap on the 'Configure Product' button below.

Step 4: Enter the Wi-Fi router SSID and Password.

Step 5: Select your Smart Pebble from the list.
E.g.:VG_EWH_BT_WF_2
"

"Step 1: Turn ON the Water Heater power.

Step 2: Press and Hold SWITCH for 10 seconds, then the LED starts blinking in white color with a beep.

Step 3: Now you can tap on the 'Configure Product' button below.

Step 4: Enter the Wi-Fi router SSID and Password.

Step 5: Select your Pebble DG Connect from the list.
E.g.:VG_EWH_BT_WF_2
"
To prevent children from accidentally turning ON/OFF plug through Smart plug physical button.
NOTE:- THIS MODE CAN BE DISABLED EITHER BY THE V GUARD SMART APP OR BY PRESSING AND HOLDING THE PHYSICAL BUTTON FOR UP TO 30 SECONDS.
To lock the plug physical button operation.

"Step 1: Power on the Smart Plug. The blue LED will blink slowly, which means it is ready for configuration.If blue LED is not blinking then Press and hold ON/OFF button approx. 5 seconds.

Step 2: Now you can tap the 'Configure Product' button below.

Step 3: Enter the Wi-Fi router SSID and Password.

Step 4: Select your Smart Plug from the list.
E.g:VG_PLUG_BT_WF_2
"
Using this, users can set the desired over load current limit according to their requirements.
Sometimes users want to change the desired over load limits, so that nobody can run the load beyond selected limits.
This will display Power, Voltage, Total energy consumption, 7 days energy trends and Total consumption reset option.
Using this, users can set the mains high cut voltage according to their requirements.
To customize the mains High cut voltage limit, So that above selected voltage it will turn OFF output to protect devices.
Plug will not work in this mode for the selected calendar days and will resume to the normal operation after the selected calendar days or by pressing the ON/OFF switch provided on the Plug.

"To turn OFF the Plug for the selected calendar days.
Note: Internet connectivity is required for this operation."
By enabling this mode, Plug will be switched ON after 180 ± 20 Sec.

"By selecting this option, user can be able to set the Plug operations in two modes – Repeat and Alternate.
Repeat: If there is only one repeating operation (ON or OFF) for your device to do, according to the selected timings. Each mains power ON this operation will repeat.
Alternate: If there are two operations (ON and OFF) for your device to do, according to the selected timings. These operations will continue until mains power OFF."
Using this, users can set the mains low cut voltage according to their requirements.
To customize the mains low cut voltage limit, So that below selected voltage it will turn OFF output to protect devices.
To turn OFF Plug, after selected hours.
There are three modes of operations (ON, OFF and Last state) and the Plug will operate basis the selection during each mains power ON condition.
To customize the Plug startup operation.
By enabling this mode, plug will automatically ON/OFF based on scheduled timings.A maximum of 8 schedules can be created.
For automatic plug operation with scheduled timings.
If you want to run household equipments with narrow input voltage band then use Equipment mode.
You can make use of this feature using the power saver switch behind the Inverter.

"Step 1: Turn ON the Water Heater power.

Step 2: Wait for 10 seconds. Then press and Hold UP-DOWN buttons until first beep.

OR


Five times OFF/ON the Water Heater. Each time, OFF the water heater only after hearing the beep.

Now the display will indicate 'CFG' and will generate 2 beeps in every 2 secs. The configuration mode will be enabled for 15 minutes.

Step 3: Now you can tap on the 'Configure Product' button below.

Step 4: Enter the Wi-Fi router SSID and Password.

Step 5: Select your Luxecube from the list.
E.g.:VG_EWH_BT_WF_2_CFG
"

"Step 1: Five times OFF / ON the Pump.

Step 2: If reconfiguration mode was successful, the buzzer will indicate, and every 2 seconds interval two beeps will generate. The configuration mode will enabled for 15 minutes.

Step 3: Now you can tap the 'Configure Product' button on the configuration page.

Step 4: Enter the Wi-Fi router SSID and Password.

Step 5: Select your Smart Pump from the list.
E.g:VG_PUMP_BT_WF_1

IMPORTANT : TURN ON THE SMART PHONE BLUETOOTH BEFORE INITIATING THE CONFIGURE PROCESS AND THE PHONE SHOULD BE IN THE RANGE OF SMART PUMP( <10 METER. )

"

"Step 1: Press and hold RESET button on the product for approx. 5 seconds, till the blue LED blinks.

OR


OFF/ON any wall switch 5 times (Final switch position is in ON condition).

Step 2: Now you can tap the 'Configure Product' button below.

Step 3: Enter the Wi-Fi router SSID and Password.

Step 4: Select your Smart Switch from the list.
E.g:VG_RETRO_BT_WF_2_CFG

Note: All connected loads will be ON/OFF once when configuration mode is successful."
This is a unique feature of AQUASMART+. The pump will automatically restart based on the selected delay time, even if the pump has encountered a Dry Run in the past.
The user can select the suitable delay time according to the next water availability in the source tank.
By enabling this mode, pump will automatically fill the water tank based on the scheduled timings. Maximum 8 schedules can be created.
For automatic pump operation with scheduled timings.

"Step 1: Five times OFF/ON the stabilizer [Turning OFF should be done after seeing the display].

Step 2: If the configuration mode was successful, the display will show \"CFG\". The configuration mode will be enabled for 15 minutes.

Step 3: Now you can tap the 'Configure Product' button on the configure page.

Step 4: Select your Stabilizer from list.
E.g:VG_STB_BT_WF_1

IMPORTANT : TURN ON THE SMART PHONE BLUETOOTH BEFORE INITIATING THE CONFIGURE PROCESS AND THE PHONE SHOULD BE IN THE RANGE OF SMART STABILIZER( <10 METER. )

"

This is a unique feature of V-Guard smart Stabilizer. The AC will automatically turns on when the user enters the set perimeter (selectable from 1Km to 5Km) and turns off when user goes out of this range.
For automatic AC ON/OFF depending on user location.
The air-conditioner is inactive for the selected calendar days and will resume normal operation after it.
To turn OFF air-conditioner for selected calendar days.

Operate air-conditioner based on schedules set. Select the required start time and end time along with the air-conditioner settings. Sleep mode can also be selected in schedules .Weekday selection available if the schedule to be repeated the selected day every week.
To operate air-conditioner during selected time automatically.
It will provide a comfort sleeping (increase temperature every hour up to maximum temperature you selected).
To prevent children from accidentally turning ON/OFF Switch through Smart switch physical button.
NOTE:- THIS MODE CAN BE DISABLED EITHER BY THE V GUARD SMART APP OR BY PRESSING AND HOLDING THE PHYSICAL BUTTON FOR UP TO 30 SECONDS.
To lock the Switch physical button operation.
By enabling this mode, Switch will be switched ON after 180 ± 20 Sec.

"By selecting this option, user can be able to set the Switch operations in two modes – Repeat and Alternate.
Repeat: If there is only one repeating operation (ON or OFF) for your device to do, according to the selected timings. Each mains power ON this operation will repeat.
Alternate: If there are two operations (ON and OFF) for your device to do, according to the selected timings. These operations will continue until mains power OFF."

"This field is for selecting the actual tank capacity in liters and is used for calculating the water consumption for the last 7 days. Editing the tank capacity is only possible through Bluetooth mode."

NOTE:- WATER CONSUMPTION HISTORY IS ONLY FOR USER INFORMATION AND NOT FOR ACTUAL MEASUREMENT PURPOSE. THE ACCURACY OF WATER USAGE READINGS MAY VARY ACCORDING TO THE QUALITY OF INSTALLATION AND VARIOUS SITE / OPERATIONAL CONDITIONS.
Please select the correct tank capacity during the installation time. Also, the user can select a different capacity during the tank replacement.
Get your battery charged in faster pace.

"Step 1: Press & hold continuously Inverter ON/OFF switch for approx. 10 Secs (Until you hear 3rd beep).

Inverter ON/OFF switch LED starts to blink.

Step 2: Now you can press 'Configure Product' button on app within 15 Minutes.

Step 3: Select your Inverter from list."

"Step 1: Press & hold continuously Inverter ON/OFF switch for approx. 10 Secs (Until you hear 3rd beep).

Inverter ON/OFF switch LED starts to blink.

Step 2: Now you can press 'Configure Product' button on app within 15 Minutes.

Step 3: Enter the Wi-Fi router SSID and Password.

Step 4: Select your Inverter from list."
If you want to run critical loads like computer then use UPS Mode.
Your product is not configured yet!. You must configure your device to use, please power on your device and press "'Configure Product'."
To reconfigure your product, please power on your device and press "'Configure Product'."
By enabling this mode, water heater provides hot water at the set schedule temperature from the ready time to the end time. The heating takes place prior to the ready time.
Pump will ON, when the water is reaching at the set Min water level and will OFF, when the water is reaching to the set Max water level.
User can select the Min and Max water level based on the requirement and water availability.
Instructions for learning the AC remote
Adjusts speed based on ambient temperature. To work best, select the convenient speed.
The Wi-Fi SSID and password have not been configured for this product. Please set them to ensure proper Wi-Fi connectivity.
Please enter a valid email ID
Password must be greater than 6 characters
Password must be greater than 5 characters
Disconnect mains & turn off critical loads before starting the configuration.
Note : Battery save and Inverter performance are inversely proportional to each other.
Mains is not available, Battery is approximately %d percentage, Backup time is around %d minutes. You are running %d percentage load.
Mains is not available, Battery is approximately %d percentage, Backup time is around %d Hours and %d minutes. You are running %d percentage load.
Mains is not available, Battery is approximately %d percentage, Backup time is around more than 24 hours. You are running %d percentage load.
Mains is not available, Battery is approximately %d percentage, Backup time is around 0 Hours and 0 minutes. You are running %d percentage load.
Mains is not available, Battery is approximately %d percentage. You are running %d percentage load.
Your Load is on mains, Mains voltage is %d Volts, Battery is approximately %d percentage.
Your Inverter is in standby mode. Mains is not available, Battery is approximately %d percentage.
It enables you to run over capacity load like an iron box or any other critical loads.
• For 24 to 30 °C: Press the Power ON button on the remote.
• For 23 to 18 °C: Press the temperature decrease button on remote.
• For OFF: Press the Power OFF button on the remote.
1. Point AC remote to the stabilizer within 2 meters distance.
2. Then in mobile App, press the highlighted Learn Key to save the temperature.
3. Repeat these same steps for each temperature key.
Long-press the bulb icon to adjust brightness and tone.
"You won't be able to change brightness when Dimmer is OFF. Please turn ON Dimmer for changing brightness."
Light is currently disabled. Please enable it to continue.
Tap the bulb icon to switch the light ON or OFF.

"V-Guard Smart App collects location data to enable below feature even when the app is closed or not in use.
• When the user enters the set perimeter of the GEO FENCING feature, the IRIS Water Heater will turns ON and water will starts heating. If the user goes out of the range, then the Water Heater will turns OFF.
Set Location to 'Allow all the time'."

"V-Guard Smart App collects location data to enable below feature even when the app is closed or not in use.
• When the user enters the set perimeter of the GEO FENCING feature, the PEBBLE Water Heater will turns ON and water will starts heating. If the user goes out of the range, then the Water Heater will turns OFF.
Set Location to 'Allow all the time'."

"V-Guard Smart App collects location data for the feature Geofencing which is used for turning ON/OFF Stabilizer automatically according to the user's location. This feature will run even if the app is closed or not in use.
Set Location to 'Allow all the time'."
To continue, location permission is required.
Are you sure you want to log out?
Your Inverter is in battery low condition.
Useful if mains fluctuations is there or sometimes Mains voltage is low and our fan speed is very slow.
Mandatory application data download failed. Please try again later.
Mandatory keys are not learned yet
Manual mode is active. Disable Manual mode to use this feature.
Please turn on manual mode to update the temperature.
AC manufacture data download failed. Try again.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
"User selectable maximum backup/performance. These settings will be available only when there is no power supply."
Maximum backup is useful where user needs long backup, where as maximum performance gives better output voltage and fan speed is increased. For factory settings press default button.
Your Inverter Mains MCB has been tripped. Please switch on your Mains MCB.
We will share a verification code on the entered mobile number.
It will allow user to select the Inverter to UPS/Normal mode as per requirement.
is also available for safe operation of household equipments, it cuts Inverter input mains below safe operating voltage.
For normal household loads use Normal mode. If you want to run critical loads like Computer then use UPS mode.
If you want to run household equipments with narrow input voltage band then use Equipment mode.
Users can select from a wide range of colors to create the desired atmosphere.
Change the light color to match your mood or the theme of an event.
Adjusts the brightness of the ambient light. Users can increase or decrease the light intensity to suit different needs or preferences.
Use different intensities to enhance the decor of a room or highlight certain areas.
Mood Light is currently disabled. Please enable it to continue.
Provides different lighting effects to create various atmospheres.
Use Flash for lively settings like parties, Fade for creating a relaxing atmosphere and different Rhythms available for playing combination of lights on Rhythm button clicks.
Users can adjust the color and brightness of the LEDs to create different moods or atmospheres.
Use the mood light to set a specific atmosphere in the room.
Use Disco model setting, to enhance your celebration mood.
Fan will automatically turn OFF after 30 minutes once Mop mode is enabled.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Something went wrong, Please try again later!
No internet connection. Please check your internet connection.
Server is not reachable. Please try again later.
User can change default Night Forced cut start timings.
In case of bad weather conditions/insufficient solar panel capacity, it is recommended to select \"No Force cut\" else select convenient timing accordingly.
"Sorry!! No groups are added yet. Please click on the below button to create group."

OTA update failed due to Boot partition set failed.
OTA update failed due to OTA_END failed.
OTA update failed due to OTAU data read failure.
OTA update failed due to OTAU Start to fail.
OTA update failed due to OTAU data write failure.
OTA update failed due to timeout.
You will be redirected to V-Guard Customer care.
Your Inverter is in over-temperature shutdown condition. Please ensure that your Inverter cooling fan is working properly and please contact customer service.
The time settings overlaps with the time set for other schedule
Your Inverter has been overloaded. Please reduce some load to avoid overload shutdown.
You have already added holiday mode dates. What would you like to do?
Panel details are not to be empty.
Password must be at least 6 characters
Camera permission is needed to take a picture. Please allow permission from Settings > Permissions.
To use this feature, allow %s permission.
Please Choose a Fan speed or a Fan mode.
Please configure AC remote in Settings to enable this feature.
You are not connected to WiFi router. Please check WiFi settings.
Please select a color for the mood light
Please select a valid end time
Please select a valid start time
Please select a valid value for the intensity
You are trying to connect with some other Plug!
V-Guard smart app provides alert when Plug usage crosses a set energy limit or set duration.
For generating alert when Plug usage exceeds a set energy/time limit.
"You have last reset the Total units consumption on %s. Do you want to reset Total units consumed?"
Plug is in high voltage shutdown condition and will resume the operation once the mains supply is healthy.
Plug switch operation detected during the Holiday Mode and Plug will resumes the normal operation.
Loop Timer is enabled. Please turn off \"Loop Timer\" for setting OFF Timer.
Plug is in low voltage shutdown condition and will resume the operation once the mains supply is healthy.
OFF Timer enabled. Please turn off \"OFF Timer\" for setting Loop Timer.
Plug is in overload shutdown, please modify the current limit or reduce the load and switch it ON.
Do you want to disable the ITDS?
Do you want to disable Loop Timer?
Do you want to enable the ITDS?
We value your input and thank you for your feedback. We’re working hard to address the issues to provide a better experience.
Are you sure you want to change Power Saver mode?

"If you want maximum savings from solar, use MAX mode.
Note: In Max mode, It will cut the Inverter mains if excess solar power is available and battery is fully charged."
If you are using almost system rated solar capacity and your mains condition is quite good then use Max mode.
Offers three dynamic animation styles for smooth color transitions.
Perfect for adding a stylish and relaxing touch to your bathroom. This mode is for ambiance only and does not reflect water temperature.
Displays user-selected colors independently of temperature, with options for static, breathing, and flashing modes.
Perfect for setting the ambiance to match your mood. Please note that this mode does not indicate any water temperature-based colors.
Automatically adjusts the light color based on water temperature, helping you avoid unexpected hot or cold surprises.
"This built-in feature helps you know when the water is ready by changing colors based on temperature: • Red – Hot (Above 60°C) • Orange – Warm (40°C to 60°C) • Blue – Cool (Below 40°C)"
The present water temperature is more than the schedule set temperature. Do you want to continue?
Press below button if both ON/OFF works with your AC
Adding a new product has been failed. Please try again later.
Your product “%s” has been successfully added.
Your product has been configured successfully.

"Your phone is not connected to the %s's network. Please connect to '%s' to continue using.
Password : %s"
Updating the product has been failed. Please try again later.
Your product “%s” has been successfully updated.

Pump is in learning mode, please try after some time.
Please check you have connected over rated solar panels or check your PV Connections properly.
Please scan the QR code located on the backside of the product/ on the carton box/ in the user manual.
Please place highlighted frame above/front of QR code printed on purchased device.
Register your product in order to avail future support from V-Guard
AC remote configured successfully. Go to Home page and check the AC functions.
"AC model remote data download failed. Press 'This Model Works' and try again."
Please share your AC manufacturer and model name with V-Guard’s technical team.This will help us to support your AC model number in near future.
"Remote not configured, please go to settings and add remote for your air conditioner (This feature will work only when the Stabilizer is turned on and connected to internet)."
This will reset the %s energy consumption.
Enter your registered email below to receive password reset instruction.
WiFi Name/Password contains restricted characters. Use only permitted ones.
You are trying to connect with some other Switch!
%d. Tap on the power button to turn On or Off all switches.
Sorry, that nickname is taken. Please try a different one.
This functionality can be used during winter season to warm up the room temperature.
A schedule is already set for this time. Setting a timer may affect its functionality. Do you want to continue?
Schedule is active, disable Schedule to use this feature.
Click on Search button for available Wi-Fi names.
Are you sure you want to set this temperature with %d°c ?
Shared user has been deleted successfully.
Failed to load shared users list.
Your Inverter output has been short-circuited. Please switch off your Inverter and check for any short circuit in output connections.
By enabling sleep mode, It automatically adjusts the Fan speed from selected high speed to desired low speed within 8 hours.

"Standard mode - For this mode press the sleep button once, the Fan speed will gradually decrease from the current level to two level below within 8 hours automatically.
Custom mode - This mode provides calm & quiet sleeping experience. It automatically adjusts the Fan speed from the selected speed to desired low level within 8 hours. To activate this, press the sleep button and select the desired speed."
Sleep mode set temperature should be greater than the temperature selected in schedule.
You have connected solar panels reversely. Please check your PV Connections properly.
Smart App – Chat with Our Expert

"Please ensure that your solar panels are cleaned for better performance.
* Please clear the Solar Panel cleaning reminder from V-Guard Smart app or Inverter front switch."
Solar panel capacity must be less than total panel capacity selected.
Solar panel capacity must be less than %d Watts.
You are trying to connect with some other Stabilizer!
Please turn ON the product to use this feature.
Start date should not be lesser than current date.
Child Lock is currently enabled. Are you sure you want to proceed with enabling Sterilizing Mode?
Do you want to %s the Sterilizing Mode?
It will take around %d minutes to reach the set temperature.
The user can change the node display icon.
Quickly and easily identify nodes if they have multiple switches.
Switch is in high voltage shutdown condition and will resume the operation once the mains supply is healthy.

Switch will not work in this mode for the selected calendar days and will resume to the normal operation after the selected calendar days or by pressing ON/OFF button provided on the APP or by wall switch operation.

"To turn OFF the Switch for the selected calendar days.
Note: Internet connectivity is required for this operation."
Switch operation detected during the Holiday Mode and switch will resumes the normal operation.
Switch is in low voltage shutdown condition and will resume the operation once the mains supply is healthy.
Are you sure you want to turn OFF all switches?
Do you want to turn ON all switches?
Are you sure you want to turn OFF the switch?
Do you want to turn ON the switch?
By enabling this mode, switch will be switched off after selected hours.
To turn OFF switch, after selected hours.
Switch is in overload shutdown, please modify the current limit or reduce the load and switch it ON.
There are three modes of operations (ON, OFF and Last state) and the switch will operate basis the selection during each mains power ON condition.
To customize the switch startup operation.
By enabling this mode, switch will automatically ON based on the scheduled timings. Maximum 8 schedules can be created.
You can set the Temperature only in Cool Mode.
Agree to the Terms and Conditions first
By proceeding, you are agreeing to our Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy.
Schedule end time must be after the start time and should have at least 5 min duration. Schedule must be within 11:59 PM of the same day.
The time interval between the two schedules must be at least one hour.
A timer is already set for this time. Setting a schedule may affect its functionality. Do you want to continue?
Total solar panel capacity not selected.
Temperature sensitive lighting is disabled now.
Useful where mains availability is for shorter duration.
Both input and output Uri must be specified
Therefore, override color resource (ucrop_color_toolbar_widget) in your app to make it work on pre-L devices
Unable to communicate with the device, please try again.
Unable to find your device, please try again.
Unable to find your product, please try again.
Unable to find your AC model/manufacturer,

if you want to add a remote, please click on the ‘ADD CUSTOME REMOTE’ button. the appliction will learn the funtions of your remoteand memorize it.This will take few minutes to complete. Switch ON your AC and keep remote with you. Make sure device is connected with Internet.
New version of firmware is available.
You have selected a different country but not yet updated. Update to continue using this feature.
Only jpeg, jpg or png format
Only for reference, can’t be used for carbon credit.
It looks like you already have an account with us. Please login using your Mobile Number.
The user assistance for %s is not available right now. Please try again later.
The user manual for %s is not available right now. Please try again later.
"Copyright © 2025. V-Guard Industries Ltd. All rights reserved."

Please update current date and time in
%s

Date : %s

Time : %s


Select Set to save the date and time to device
This is an option for technical support team to reconfigure your Water Heater. Are you sure you want to continue ?
Give a name for your product[CAPS Only, Max 8 characters].
Your alternate mobile number has been verified successfully.
Your email id has been verified successfully.
Your mobile number has been verified successfully.
Fan is in auto cleaning mode and will rotates in opposite direction for 15 minutes. Please press any speed key on remote / Mobile app to exit from auto cleaning mode.
Fan is in fault condition and the LED will blink 3 times indicating the fault. Once the fault is cleared the Fan restart automatically after a few seconds.
Fan is in fault condition and Fan will show “F” indicating the fault. Once the fault is cleared the Fan restart automatically after a few seconds.
When a fault condition is detected, three LEDs blink simultaneously. Once the fault is cleared, the fan will automatically restart after a few seconds.
Water Heater is in high voltage shutdown condition and will resume the operation once the mains supply is healthy.
Water Heater is in low voltage shutdown condition and will resume the operation once the mains supply is healthy.
Please check Water Heater inlet pipe connection for leak, fill Water Heater with water then turn on heater.Contact customer service if problem persists.
High electricity tariff from 6–10 PM. Schedule before 6 PM to save money!
Loop Timer is currently enabled, please turn off \"Loop Timer\" to create/edit/enable schedule.
Turn off Water Heater, wait for it to cool then turn on.Contact customer service if problem persists.

Fan is in fault condition and if the fault condition persists even after 2 restarts, the Fan indicate this fault by blinking LED 6 times along with buzzer. If this condition persists kindly turn off the power and contact customer care.

Fan is in fault condition and if the fault condition persists even after 2 restarts, the fan indicate this fault by blinking “F” continuously. If this condition persists kindly turn off the power and contact customer care.

When a fault condition is detected, three LEDs will blink simultaneously. If the fault persists even after two restarts, the fan will indicate a permanent fault by continuously blinking all three LEDs simultaneously. If this condition persists kindly turn off the power and contact customer care.
Schedule is currently enabled, please turn off all enabled schedules to enable Loop Timer.
Please attach the bill for the paperless warranty.
The required hot water will not be ready by the set schedule time. Do you want to continue?
Please check your battery water level. Press and hold Inverter front switch for 5 sec (until the 2nd beep) to clear the battery water topping indication.
Current temperature is less than -9 degree celsius
Welcome to the world of V-Guard smart appliances. Just sync your smartphone to control from anywhere, anytime through your smart app.
Pump is in high voltage, Shut down
Pump is in low voltage, Shut down
Easily keep a check on the product usage and performance of your product on the V-Guard Smart app through user friendly data charts.
An exclusive app loaded with a host of intelligent features that lets you operate your V-Guard smart appliances, at the click of a button.
Take the power in your hand
Present water level of the tank is %d percentage
Present water level of the tank is below %d percentage
Your Product WiFi name is changed to %1$s
To continue, enabling Wi-Fi is required.
"If you skip, the product won't be able to connect to the internet."
Change the WiFi settings of the product
Works in load on Inverter condition.
It seems you are trying to connect a Inverter model that is not matching with your registered product.
You have an active schedule. Do you want to disable?
